mapper.delete: DELETE FROM article_report WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND report_date = #{reportDate}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO article_report (category_id, report_date, article_id, position, relevance_score, article_title_en, article_title_zh, article_abstract_en, article_abstract_zh, article_link, background_en, background_zh, effects_en, effects_zh, event_summary_en, event_summary_zh, technology_and_innovation_en, technology_and_innovation_zh, value_and_impact_en, value_and_impact_zh, category_summary_en, category_summary_zh) VALUES
(#{item.categoryId}, #{item.reportDate}, #{item.articleId}, #{item.position}, #{item.relevanceScore}, #{item.articleTitleEn}, #{item.articleTitleZh}, #{item.articleAbstractEn}, #{item.articleAbstractZh}, #{item.articleLink}, #{item.backgroundEn}, #{item.backgroundZh}, #{item.effectsEn}, #{item.effectsZh}, #{item.eventSummaryEn}, #{item.eventSummaryZh}, #{item.technologyAndInnovationEn}, #{item.technologyAndInnovationZh}, #{item.valueAndImpactEn}, #{item.valueAndImpactZh}, #{item.categorySummaryEn}, #{item.categorySummaryZh})
